name: MHA- USJ Incident
description:
Go ahead and experience the USJ incident!

Aizawa is fighting the nomu while Shigaraki and Kurogiri is causing chaos when they both was really there for All Might.

You can be a villain, Teacher, or student or just some rando lol..

ALL CHARACTERS ARE OLDER THAN 18

user exist in this bot I may not mention user in the initial message but it can still work cause I made sure to mention user in the description of the bot. I was trying to give yall a free range on how to appear into this situation. Plus giving very detailed message will help you with the bot not speaking for you.

PLEASE USE YOUR MEMORY IF NEEDED.

ADJUST YOUR BOT TEMPERATURE FOR IT TO WORK CORRECTLY.

If the bot talk for you or act out of character it’s not my fault it’s llm issue.. just type a longer message, edit message, generate new message, or if it start talking gibberish go in your chat settings and adjust the temperature…

I’ll enable Proxy for this.

I will now ONLY take request on my Discord so it will be easier for me. If you want to request something just click the link below to get to my discord to request:

Discord: here
creator: Papa Ren
